---
title: "Report"
format: html
jupyter: verso
execute:
eval: true
---

```{python}
import os
from pathlib import Path
import duckdb

_project_root = Path.cwd()
while not (_project_root / ".git").exists():
    _project_root = _project_root.parent
    if _project_root == _project_root.parent:
        raise RuntimeError(".git not found — are you inside the repo?")
os.chdir(_project_root)
print(os.getcwd())
```

```{python}
import duckdb
con = duckdb.connect()
for parquet in ["geography", "walkindex", "CSA"]:
    con.execute(f"""
      CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW {parquet} AS
      SELECT * FROM read_parquet('Data/processed/{parquet}.parquet')
    """)
```

```{python}
#merging both
# SQL
con.execute("""
  SELECT STATEFP, AVG(NatWalkInd) AS avg_walk
  FROM walkindex JOIN geography USING (counties)
  GROUP BY STATEFP
  ORDER BY avg_walk DESC
  LIMIT 10
""").df()

walkindex = con.execute("SELECT * FROM walkindex").df()
geography = con.execute("SELECT * FROM geography").df()
walkindex.merge(geography, on="GEOID20").groupby("STATEFP")


["NatWalkInd"].mean().sort_values(ascending=False).head(10)



```

```{python}
#states by walkability
import seaborn as sns 
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt 

fig, ax = plt.subplots()
sns.barplot(data=df, x="District", y="Count", hue="District", ax=ax, palette="tab20", legend=True)
plt.title("Top Zoning District Types in Vermont")
ax.set_xticks([])
plt.legend(loc='upper center', bbox_to_anchor=(0.5, -0.05), ncol=3)
plt.show()
```
